2285750.name: Rise of the Dead
2285750.description:
RISE OF THE DEAD

The cure is buried. The dead are rising.

You wake up alone inside a remote mountain research facility.
The lights are failing.
The corridors are silent.

The floors covered in blood.
And something is moving in the dark.

A distorted phone call from a first responder named Frank delivers a single objective:

Find the vaccine. Escape before the facility is destroyed.

🧟 ABOUT THE GAME

Rise of the Dead is a story-driven survival horror game built in Unreal Engine 5, blending tense exploration, environmental storytelling, and classic puzzle-based progression.

Set inside a vast research complex carved deep into a remote mountain, you play as a security guard who wakes with no memory of how the outbreak began — only the growing realisation that the personnell are not so alive anymore.

The facility is failing.
The infection is spreading.
And time is running out.

🏔️ A DEAD MOUNTAIN FACILITY

Explore a sprawling, interconnected research complex featuring:

  • Security offices and surveillance rooms

  • Medical wards and triage areas

  • Research laboratories and biocontainment zones

  • Dormitories, maintenance tunnels, and power stations

  • An abandoned underground train station — your only escape

Each location tells its own story through bloodstains, destroyed equipment, documents, audio logs, and environmental clues.

📞 A VOICE ON THE LINE

Throughout your journey, you receive phone calls from Frank, a first responder coordinating containment efforts from the facility entrance car park.

His information guides you — but as the facility reveals its secrets, his words begin to raise questions.

Is Frank helping you…
Or using you?

🧬 FIND THE VACCINE

Was the outbreak corporate greed, accidental or military trial?

Uncover classified experiments, failed trials, and unethical research as you descend deeper into the mountain.
The vaccine exists — but it may not be complete.

Your choices determine:

  • How much of the truth you uncover

  • What condition the vaccine is in

  • And what escapes the mountain with you

🔑 SURVIVAL HORROR GAMEPLAY

  • Exploration-focused survival horror

  • Limited resources and ammunition

  • Environmental puzzles and key-based progression

  • Minimal UI for maximum immersion

Combat is dangerous.
Running may be wiser than fighting.

🔥 A RACE AGAINST DESTRUCTION

As you near the truth, the facility begins to collapse.

Emergency systems fail.
Containment protocols activate.
Explosions tear through the mountain.

Fight your way to the train station as the complex self-destructs around you, and escape before everything is buried forever.

🎮 FEATURES

  • Built in Unreal Engine 5 with cutting-edge lighting and atmosphere

  • A fully explorable, interconnected mountain facility

  • Narrative delivered through phone calls, documents, and the environment

  • Cinematic rich environment

  • Designed for fans of classic and modern survival horror

⚠️ WILL YOU SAVE THE WORLD… OR JUST YOURSELF?

The dead are rising.
The truth is buried.
And the mountain won’t stay standing forever.

Wishlist now and prepare to descend into the dark.
